user_query: Give me a summary of all activity related to my next calendar event.

plan.query: Give me a summary of all activity related to my next calendar event.
plan.reasoning: The query requires gathering current calendar event details along with any relevant communication history. Therefore, both the graph agent is needed to access the calendar and communication information.

steps.task: Retrieve the next calendar event details and any related emails or calendar events that involve the same participants.

plan.synthesis: Summarize the next calendar event details and related activity gathered from the previous step.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve the next calendar event details and any related emails or calendar events that involve the same participants.
